---
title: "skim taxi data"
author: "Isabella Westlauer"
date: "2026-04-07"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(arrow)
library(dplyr)
library(skimr)
# data dictionary
# https://www.nyc.gov/assets/tlc/downloads/pdf/data_dictionary_trip_records_yellow.pdf

taxi <- read_parquet(file.choose(), header = TRUE) |> skim()
head(taxi)
summary(taxi)
skim(taxi)
```
